subject: fix the build issue of the SO-docker
commit_message:
fix the build issue of the SO-docker

Issue-ID: SO-2765

Signed-off-by: seshukm <seshu.kumar.m@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I66583bf031057961c1b243400d0a6004c541a346

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 1: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/so-master-verify-java/5391
Change has been successfully merged by Byung-Woo Jun
